headline: IBM announces new innovation center at Chicago quantum park, creating 750 new tech jobs
summary: Building on its growing Chicago quantum footprint, IBM is creating a FutureNow delivery center at the Illinois Quantum and Microelectronics Park, with a commitment to create 750 new full-time technology jobs on the city’s South Side. The center, one of a handful scattered across North America, will serve as an IBM innovation hub to solve business and technology challenges for its clients. It ...

headline: Is It Time To Revisit IBM (IBM) After The Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether International Business Machines at around US$233 a share still offers value, or if the easier gains have already been realized. The stock is down 8.9% over the past week and 20.1% year to date, while the 3 year and 5 year returns of 106.4% and 104.3% present a very different picture. Recent headlines have focused on International Business Machines as a key name in large cap tech, with investors weighing its role in software and services against shifting...

headline: IBM CEO makes bold call on quantum computing
summary: IBM CEO Arvind Krishna is doubling down on quantum as IBM’s next big bet. In an April 17 interview with Semafor, Krishna said the technology may not be far off. “Quantum is probably 3 to 5 years away in terms of timing,” he said, adding it “is going to solve the kinds of problems AI could not do.” ...

headline: STX Q3 Earnings Top Estimates, Revenues Up on AI-Led Storage Demand
summary: Seagate's fiscal Q3 beat on earnings and revenues estimates as AI-driven data center demand lifts nearline shipments and margins, sending shares higher.

headline: Entrust Announces Collaboration With IBM to Help Enterprises Modernize Cryptography Security Posture and Make the Transition Toward Quantum-Safe Security
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, April 29, 2026--Entrust collaborates with IBM Consulting, helping enterprises take control of their cryptography and execute a transition to quantum-safe security.

headline: Quantum Computing Stocks Are Next Big Play After AI, Says Defiance ETF Executive
summary: Sylvia Jablonski, chief investment officer at Defiance ETFs, explores key investing issues for quantum computing stocks.

headline: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab Launches to Shape the Future of AI and Quantum Computing
summary: IBM (NYSE: IBM) and the Massachusetts Institute of Technology today announced the launch of the MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab, advancing their long-standing collaboration to shape the next era of computing. The new lab expands its scope to include quantum computing, alongside foundational artificial intelligence research, with the goal of unlocking new computational approaches that go beyond the limits of today's classical systems.
